blocks.text: Premium Magnetic, Drawer, Book-Style and Collapsible Rigid Boxes for Retail and Export Packaging

Jinhao Xinyuan Group manufactures high-quality luxury rigid gift boxes for cosmetics, electronics, premium retail goods, and corporate gifting.All rigid boxes are produced in our Vietnam and China factories under FSC®, ISO 9001, SMETA, and GMI color management systems.Our rigid box workshops include semi-automatic and fully automated assembly lines, ensuring precise corners, strong structural integrity, and consistent surface finishing.We support customers with CAD development, sampling, and mass production for both small and large-volume projects.

Magnetic rigid boxes provide a premium appearance with a strong, secure closure.These are commonly used for cosmetics, electronics, presentation kits, and corporate gifting.Clean corner finishing and high-quality wrapped paper ensure a premium retail experience.

Drawer-style rigid boxes offer a smooth slide-out mechanism and enhanced product protection.This structure is suitable for jewelry, accessories, electronics, and high-value retail products.Customizable sleeves, ribbon pulls, and printed wrapping are available.

Book-style rigid boxes are commonly used in electronics, cosmetics, and premium gift sets.The hardcover design provides a solid structure with large surfaces for branding and graphics.Magnetic or ribbon closures can be added depending on the product.

Also known as two-piece rigid boxes, this structure is widely used across retail categories.The design offers flexibility in height, thickness, and interior layout.Simple to assemble and suitable for mass-market premium packaging.

Collapsible rigid boxes reduce shipping volume while maintaining a high-end appearance when assembled.Magnetic or Velcro closures allow the box to fold flat for transportation.Ideal for international shipping and e-commerce brands.

Rigid boxes can be produced with FSC-certified greyboard, recycled paper options, and water-based or soy-based inks.Low-VOC coatings and eco-friendly laminations are available for sustainable packaging programs.All factories operate under ISO 9001 and SMETA compliance frameworks.
Rigid greyboard thickness ranges from 1.0 mm to 3.0 mm depending on the required strength and size.Stronger boards are recommended for heavy or fragile items.
Wrapping paper options include art paper, kraft paper, textured paper, specialty papers, and fabric-style coverings.All surfaces can be printed, laminated, or enhanced with premium finishes.

Each rigid box is developed using CAD engineering, die-line design, and sampling to ensure accurate product fit.Edges, corners, and panels are checked manually and through automated control processes.
